**es-33 (excerpt):** # World War Trump ## Essay body The Iranians have shot down an American F-15. Both the Americans and the Iranians are racing to find the pilot. The Iranians have damaged a Warthog as well as two Blackhawk helicopters involved in the search and rescue mission. The stakes cannot be higher.
